Document:
# Rule A1: ERP is NOT allowed
Despite being a 18+ server, ERP (Erotic RolePlay) is strictly forbidden in any circumstances. - No explicit sexual content/themes are allowed, whether in roleplay, character records, character descriptions or anywhere else. - Insults, vague teasing and such are allowed if done tastefully. For example saying "Yeah we fuck everyday" as a joke is acceptable. Use the Admin Help (F1) chat if you have any doubts regarding this rule. - Romantic roleplay is allowed so long as it does not escalate to sexual themes. Kissing and hand-holding are allowed within reason.
## Examples: Allowed: - Insults such as calling someone a dickhead or telling someone to "shove it up your ass". - Being affectionate in a mutually consensual way. - Openly being in a loving relationship with another crew member. - Kissing, hand-holding, dates and non-sexual physical interaction, within reason. - Flirting with other crew members or antagonists (so long as they don't express discomfort).
Prohibited: - Emoting sexual acts. - Erotic content.
[color=#ff0000]If roleplay reaches a point where it has become sexual and/or uncomfortable, immediately stop and contact an administrator or moderator.[/color] [color=#ff0000]Breach of this rule may have you banned permanently from Quantum Blue.[/color]
[color=#ff0000]If you have any questions or concerns, please ask an admin via the AHelp (F1) chat.[/color]
